reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar y rica comida en el restaurante confitería.  Lindo lugar para parar en familia. Atrás tiene juegos para chicos.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop and delicious food at the restaurant/confectionery. A lovely place to stop with the family. There's a playground for children out back.

reviews.comment:
Paramos en el restorante para almorzar (excelente la comida y la atención) pero cuando salimos la rueda con un agujero, la inflamos y tenia un tajo justo a la vista HO casualidad! . Una semana tiene de uso, es NUEVA.- Estoy convencido de que alguien lo hicieron a propósito. Obviamente fuimos a la gomeria que queda a unas cuadras.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped at the restaurant for lunch (the food and service were excellent), but when we left, we noticed a tire with a hole in it. We inflated it, and it had a cut right there in plain sight—what a coincidence! It was only a week old, practically brand new. I'm convinced someone did it on purpose. Obviously, we went to the tire shop a few blocks away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eklmTE93EAE
